Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naraka]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Naraka is a place from which ferocious creatures originate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Naraka is a place described as having black pits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Naraka has waypoints used for fast travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Naraka is the name of Grandmaster Naraka's Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Naraka is a place one can Travel through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — The red stone of Naraka has a gritty, sandy outer coating like fine ash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Naraka is a stripe of Traveler associated with burnt red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Naraka is a place from which power can be pulled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Naraka is a group that sends reinforcements.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Naraka is a blond woman who can summon fire from the Furnace of Judgment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Naraka is a type of Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Naraka was one of the Travelers who attacked Simon's parents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Naraka is known as the Cavern of Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Naraka represents law and order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Naraka wears red-tinted glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Naraka is a place from which incursions may come.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Naraka is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Naraka Travelers wear blood-red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Naraka is a Territory that Simon intends to never visit again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Naraka is a Damascan Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Naraka is a place containing flaming black lizard-things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Naraka represents justice.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Naraka will judge and punish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Naraka is someone Alin has not seen all day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Naraka is a deity or force that can be invoked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Naraka knows what patrols the streets from sundown to sunup.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Grandmaster Naraka wears traditional dark red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Naraka is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Indirial ordered to go into Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The old woman and the guards remained in Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Naraka is one of the nine Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — A red Gate could lead into Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Naraka is a Territory that the group has traveled through before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Naraka has a pack of dogs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Rhalia kept Shai in the City to keep her safe from Naraka.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
